parameters.jsCode: return $input.all().map(item=>{const r=item.json; const job=$('Validate Batch 1-50').item.json; const attempt=$runIndex+1; const status=Number(r.statusCode||r.status||0); if(status>=200&&status<300) return {json:{...r.body,...job,render_status:'completed',retry:false,attempt}}; const retryable=status===0||[408,425,429].includes(status)||status>=500; if(!retryable) throw new Error(`NON_RETRYABLE: renderer HTTP ${status}`); if(attempt>=3) throw new Error(`RETRY_EXHAUSTED: renderer HTTP ${status||'transport'} after ${attempt} attempts`); return {json:{...job,retry:true,retry_delay_seconds:2**(attempt-1),last_http_status:status||null}};});

return $input.all().map(item=>{const r=item.json; const source=$('Download Rendered MP4').item; const attempt=$runIndex+1; if(!r.error) return {json:{...source.json,storage_status:'completed',retry:false,attempt},binary:source.binary}; const status=Number(r.statusCode||r.status||r.httpCode||0); const retryable=status===0||[408,425,429].includes(status)||status>=500; if(!retryable) throw new Error(`NON_RETRYABLE: storage HTTP ${status}`); if(attempt>=3) throw new Error(`RETRY_EXHAUSTED: storage HTTP ${status||'transport'} after ${attempt} attempts`); return {json:{...source.json,retry:true,retry_delay_seconds:2**(attempt-1),last_http_status:status||null},binary:source.binary};});

const job=$('Classify Render Result').item.json; const base=String($env.CAL3_MEDIA_BASE_URL||'').replace(/\/$/,''); if(!base.startsWith('https://')) throw new Error('NON_RETRYABLE: CAL3_MEDIA_BASE_URL must be HTTPS'); return [{json:{...job,videoUrl:`${base}/cal-3/pending/${job.job_id}.mp4`,caption:`${job.word} ${job.ipa} — ${job.meaning_vi}\n${job.example_en}\n${job.cta}`}}];

return $input.all().map(item=>{const r=item.json; const source=$('Build Media URL').item.json; const attempt=$runIndex+1; const status=Number(r.statusCode||r.status||0); if(status>=200&&status<300) return {json:{...source,status:'publish_initialized',publish_id:r.body?.publishId,mode:r.body?.mode,cached:r.body?.cached===true,retry:false,attempt}}; const retryable=status===0||[408,425,429].includes(status)||status>=500; if(!retryable) throw new Error(`NON_RETRYABLE: publish HTTP ${status}`); if(attempt>=3) throw new Error(`RETRY_EXHAUSTED: publish HTTP ${status||'transport'} after ${attempt} attempts`); return {json:{...source,retry:true,retry_delay_seconds:2**(attempt-1),last_http_status:status||null}};});
return $input.all().map(item=>({json:{job_id:item.json.job_id,status:'WAITING_FOR_APPROVAL',reason:'Set approved=true and N8N_CAL3_PUBLISH_ENABLED=true only for an authorized manual test'}}));
